access.authentication: not required for the public browse and detail surfaces
access.machineReadableAccess: not verified in this discovery pass
access.licence: review official copyright and terms before redistribution

collections: Acts in force by title and year
subordinate legislation in force by title, year, and parent Act
superseded reprints and historical in-force dates

authority.authoritativeStatus: official web register; machine-readable authority and format precedence not yet verified
authority.wordStatus: format and authority status require provider review

adapterMapping.search: Not enabled; use official browse/search routes only after a stable machine-readable contract is verified.
adapterMapping.retrieval: Future adapter may retrieve an official representation after format authority, copyright, and provenance review.
adapterMapping.versioning: Use source status, commencement, reprint, history, and as-in-force cues; do not infer versions from filenames.
adapterMapping.export: Unsupported until a source-backed parser and provenance-preserving export exists.
adapterMapping.provenance: Emit source authority, jurisdiction, source URL, collection, format, status, and retrieval timestamp.
adapterMapping.unsupported: Return structured unsupported_provider_capability for runtime operations until tests and fixtures prove the adapter.

edgeCases: current and historical in-force collections are distinct source surfaces
Acts, subordinate legislation, Bills, gazettes, and Hansard are different collections
commencement and as-in-force dates can differ
Word and PDF downloads require an explicit authority decision before parsing
no public machine-readable API or feed was verified in this discovery pass
fixturePolicy: metadata-only source-shape fixture; no legal text or fabricated records
